header_text: Not a lot of likes: Behaviors

elements.text:
You decide to reply all to a department-wide email to share an idea. It's been a few hours and no one has responded to your suggestion yet. 

Here are some behaviors that someone might do at that moment or in the future:

text: I dwell on the idea and sulk.
I continue my work without focusing on the email.
The next time my department emails me about an idea, I'll share it.
I want to tell people to forget about my idea, but I leave it as is.
I sit and check if anyone has replied, but decide to go out and enjoy the day.
